genres.name: Progressive House
genres.description: Evolving, layered house music with long builds and melodic progression

genres.name: Melodic Techno
genres.description: Emotive techno with rich harmonics, pads, and sweeping melodies

genres.name: Minimal Techno
genres.description: Stripped-back, hypnotic techno driven by rhythm and texture

genres.name: Deep House
genres.description: Warm, soulful house with deep basslines and atmospheric pads

genres.name: Tech House
genres.description: Percussive house with techno elements and driving grooves

genres.name: Organic House
genres.description: Natural textures, ethnic instruments, and downtempo electronic fusion

genres.name: Afro House
genres.description: African rhythms and percussion blended with deep electronic production

genres.name: Electronica
genres.description: Experimental and ambient electronic music for listening

labels.name: Lost & Found
labels.description: Guy J's imprint — pure progressive excellence

labels.name: Sudbeat
labels.description: Hernan Cattaneo's home for deep progressive

labels.name: Anjunadeep
labels.description: Premium melodic & deep house from Above & Beyond

labels.name: Afterlife
labels.description: Tale of Us' melodic techno powerhouse

labels.name: Watergate
labels.description: Berlin club's label — deep and driving

labels.name: Pissawong Records
labels.description: Thai house & cultural electronic from Thailand

labels.name: Replug
labels.description: Deep progressive with Cid Inc, Dmitry Molosh

artists.name: Patrice Bäumel
artists.bio: Amsterdam-based DJ and producer known for hypnotic, emotionally charged sets that bridge progressive house and techno. Resident at Watergate Berlin.

artists.name: Enamour
artists.bio: DC-based producer creating deep, melodic soundscapes on Anjunadeep and This Never Happened. Known for introspective, emotionally intense productions.

artists.name: Kleiman
artists.bio: Gabriel Kleiman from Mexico City has been shaping the electronic scene for over 20 years. His signature sound blends percussive elements with deeper progressive branches.

artists.name: Robag Wruhme
artists.bio: Born Gabor Schablitzki. Pioneered hyperkinetic minimal techno as half of Wighnomy Brothers. Idiosyncratic style of rapid-fire percussive bursts and plangent synth melodies.

artists.name: Hernán Cattáneo
artists.bio: One of the most influential progressive house DJs of all time. His weekly Resident radio show is essential listening. Legendary for marathon sets that build across hours.

artists.name: Wildealer
artists.bio: Dynamic DJ duo from Thailand blending electronic music with Thai cultural elements. Genre-fluid sound shaped by deep rhythm, cultural roots, and modern production.

artists.name: Guy J
artists.bio: Israeli maestro of progressive house. Founded Lost & Found label in 2012 with John Digweed's support. Beautifully layered compositions and flawless journey-like DJ sets.

artists.name: Stephan Bodzin
artists.bio: German producer and live performer known for emotionally powerful, analog-driven techno. Powers of Ten is a landmark album. Legendary live sets.

artists.name: Nick Warren
artists.bio: Legendary DJ and one half of Way Out West. A pillar of progressive house. Balance and Global Underground compilations are masterclasses.

artists.name: Lane 8
artists.bio: Daniel Goldstein creates delicate, minimal melodic house. Founder of This Never Happened label — phone-free events and deeply intimate productions.

artists.name: Guy Mantzur
artists.bio: Israeli progressive maestro with intricate, groove-driven productions. Regular collaborator with Sahar Z.

artists.name: DJ Koze
artists.bio: One of electronic music's most beloved eccentrics. His Pampa label and albums like Knock Knock blend house, pop, and experimental sounds into something unique.

artists.name: Tinlicker
artists.bio: Dutch duo known for rich, layered textures and emotional intensity. Major releases on Anjunadeep, blending progressive with trance-influenced melodies.

artists.name: Agents Of Time
artists.bio: Italian trio delivering revered live sets blending IDM, techno, and melodic elements. Founders of Obscura label.

artists.name: Henry Saiz
artists.bio: Spanish artist blending progressive house with ambient textures and cinematic soundscapes. Balance compilation is a masterpiece.

artists.name: Cid Inc
artists.bio: Swedish producer of meticulously crafted progressive house and melodic techno. Deeply respected by the underground.

artists.name: Joris Voorn
artists.bio: Dutch master of eclectic electronic sets spanning progressive house, tech house and melodic techno. Known for emotional depth and technical precision.

artists.name: Pantha du Prince
artists.bio: Hendrik Weber creates hypnotic, intricate combinations of melodic chimes and dark techno beats. Unique voice in experimental electronic music.

artists.name: Yotto
artists.bio: Finnish producer with a signature blend of Nordic melancholy and progressive warmth. Runs the Odd One Out label.

artists.name: Jeremy Olander
artists.bio: Swedish producer crafting dark, driving progressive house. Protégé of Eric Prydz. Founder of Vivrant label.

artists.name: Sasha
artists.bio: Legendary DJ who pioneered progressive house in the 90s. Scene Delete album and Last Night on Earth label push boundaries.

artists.name: John Digweed
artists.bio: Prolific DJ and founder of Bedrock Records. His Transitions radio show is essential listening. One of the most consistent selectors in electronic music.

artists.name: Rodriguez Jr.
artists.bio: Olivier Mateu performs stunning live sets blending melodic house and techno. Master of eclecticism on Mobilee.

artists.name: Einmusik
artists.bio: German producer creating atmospheric melodic house and techno. Emotional, sweeping productions.

artists.name: Bedouin
artists.bio: Duo blending Middle Eastern and global influences with deep electronic production. Founders of Human by Default label.

artists.name: Be Svendsen
artists.bio: Danish producer creating a unique sonic world blending organic textures, global influences and electronic production.

artists.name: Nicola Cruz
artists.bio: Ecuadorian artist pioneering Andean electronic music, weaving traditional South American instruments and rhythms into deep electronic landscapes.

artists.name: Mind Against
artists.bio: Italian brothers based in Berlin creating dark, emotionally charged melodic techno. Cornerstones of the Afterlife label.

artists.name: Eelke Kleijn
artists.bio: Dutch producer who doubles as a film and TV composer. Productions carry a cinematic quality. Runs DAYS like NIGHTS label.

artists.name: Khen
artists.bio: Israeli producer crafting warm, detailed progressive house with subtle textures and hypnotic grooves.

artists.name: Michael Mayer
artists.bio: Godfather of Kompakt Records and one of Germany's most celebrated DJs. Sets weave through minimal, pop, and techno.

artists.name: Dmitry Molosh
artists.bio: Belarusian producer creating deeply atmospheric progressive house with rich textures. Rising force in the global progressive scene.

artists.name: Acid Pauli
artists.bio: German producer creating eclectic, genre-defying electronic music. Blends organic textures, world music and experimental sounds.

artists.name: Dave DK
artists.bio: German producer fusing Euro Dance-Disco influences with minimal techno. Known for Val Maira and warm, textured productions.

artists.name: Simon Doty
artists.bio: Canadian producer creating warm, melodic progressive house. Rising talent on This Never Happened and Anjunadeep.

artists.name: Jerro
artists.bio: American producer blending organic textures with melodic house. Rising star on This Never Happened.

artists.name: Roman Flügel
artists.bio: One of German electronic music's biggest names since the 90s. Chameleon across ambient, IDM, house, techno, and electro.

artists.name: Ezequiel Arias
artists.bio: Argentine progressive house star championed by Hernan Cattaneo, now an Anjunadeep cornerstone. Known for emotionally charged, extended DJ sets and five Beatport #1s in 2025.

artists.name: Simon Vuarambon
artists.bio: Swiss-Argentine producer crafting smooth, profound progressive house. Releases on Bedrock, Anjunadeep, SCI+TEC, and All Day I Dream with a deeply emotional, journey-driven sound.

artists.name: Denis Horvat
artists.bio: Copenhagen-based craftsman of deep, emotive techno with releases on Innervisions, Afterlife, and his own Vokabularium imprint. Rich analog textures and immersive, melancholic energy.

artists.name: Gai Barone
artists.bio: Italian progressive house veteran delivering heavy basslines and swirling melodic textures. A Beatport top 3 selling progressive artist in 2025 with releases across multiple labels.

artists.name: Kamilo Sanclemente
artists.bio: Colombian progressive house force known for sultry grooves and emotionally charged soundscapes. Beatport's #4 progressive house seller in 2025, with releases on Sudbeat, Anjunadeep, and Global Underground.

artists.name: Nordfold
artists.bio: Norwegian producer crafting warm, sun-drenched progressive house for Anjunadeep. Five solo releases on the label and a fan favourite at Anjuna events, with a sound that balances deep grooves and euphoric melody.

artists.name: Dosem
artists.bio: Spanish electronic stalwart exploring the deeper side of techno with precision drums and driving rhythms. Releases on Anjunadeep, Anjunabeats, Bedrock, and Sudbeat, with his 2025 Futuregate EP pushing into darker progressive territory.

artists.name: Quivver
artists.bio: John Graham, five-time DJ Mag Top 100 artist and multi-genre innovator with a career spanning three decades. Bedrock Records mainstay and Beatport's #5 progressive house seller in 2025, known for genre-defying productions that bridge deep house, progressive, and techno.
